title: PreCareBot: 状態別平均滞在時間

panels.title: 状態ごとの平均滞在秒数

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  to_state AS state,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_occurred_at - occurred_at))) AS avg_seconds
FROM (
  SELECT
    task_id,
    to_state,
    occurred_at,
    LEAD(occurred_at) OVER (PARTITION BY task_id ORDER BY occurred_at) AS next_occurred_at
  FROM task_state_transitions
) t
WHERE next_occurred_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY to_state
ORDER BY avg_seconds DESC
